notes: Exceptional report quality. mapreduce_resources.md comprehensively addresses all six required sections with detailed tables, exact timestamps, and insightful analysis. Container inventory (13 containers), allocation timeline (request→assign latencies), scheduling snapshots (pending maps/reduces over time), reduce slow-start threshold (10%, 15:39:24), container reuse (none, JVM reuse disabled), and resource efficiency (9% speculation overhead, 80s reduce tail) are all thoroughly analyzed. Minor deduction: created two report files (mapreduce_resources.md and mapreduce_resources_1.md appear identical) and a parse_log.py script unnecessarily; efficient submission should use single output file. Overall: production-quality resource analysis with excellent data extraction and presentation.
